name: Dot-Swarm
description: Memory prompt supplement that injects .swarm/state.md + queue.md (and any configured peer files) into the agent's memory section. Coexists with memory-core / memory-lancedb / active-memory rather than replacing them — registers via registerMemoryPromptSupplement, not as a kind:"memory" backend.

swarmDir.description: Directory containing .swarm/ trail files. Default: $PWD/.swarm if it exists, else ~/.openclaw/.swarm

includeFiles.description: Files within swarmDir to inject into the memory prompt (default: ["state.md", "queue.md"])

maxBytes.description: Total byte cap across all injected files. Default 32768. If exceeded, files are truncated with a marker.

registerSwarmReadTool.description: If true, also register a swarm_read agent tool so the agent can re-read files mid-session (default: true)
